reason: Verified that the browser use feature successfully opens a browser, navigates to a URL, retrieves the page title, and returns the correct result mentioning "Example Domain"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing Super Agent interface with three agents listed in sidebar
Found and clicked the "QA-20260417-014520-9m2t" agent in the sidebar — Agent page opened successfully with chat interface and input field
Sent message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." — Message was entered in the input field and send button became active
Clicked send button to transmit the message — Message was sent, agent status changed to "working", and a new session "Browser Navigation Page Title Check" was created
Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Agent completed the task in 6 seconds and returned the response "The page title is Example Domain."

Verified response mentions "Example Domain" — Response clearly states "The page title is Example Domain." Additionally, the browser preview panel on the right displayed the Example Domain page, and the activity log showed both the "Open Browser" and "Browser Command $ get title" actions were successfully completed
